title: Bee
summary: The most persistent questioner of the autumn-2020 channeled-guest cycle — nine sessions from the Anunnaki to the political clones.
markdown:
**Bee** is the great questioner of the record's autumn 2020 — present in nine sessions,
greeting each visiting intelligence with the same warm formality: *"Hi, teacher, this is
Bee. How are you?"* Unimetrix 1 returns the courtesy in kind: *"Greeting entity Bee."*

Her questions draw out some of the record's most memorable material. To the
[Anunnaki teacher](/lore/anunnaki/): *"Hello, Father Anu... My question is, how were
humans created and at what time were we created?"* — prompting the creation-story session
of December 2020. And it is Bee's question about political candidates in the October 11,
2020 session that produces the record's bluntest claim about
[cloning](/lore/cloning/): that much of the political class is *"biological copy or
clones"* — the exchange cut short by interference moments after she asks for names.

Across the [Insectoid](/lore/insectoids/), [Andromedan](/lore/andromedan-council/), and
Anunnaki audiences, Bee is the community's gentle interrogator — the voice that says
thank you to every teacher, and keeps asking anyway.
